name: M2: Keep-Alive & Network Resilience
objective: Implement network resilience for mobile: visibility detection, exponential backoff reconnection, offline message queue, and session state recovery.
exit_criteria: App detects page visibility changes (visibilitychange, pagehide events)
Queue flushed on reconnection with FIFO ordering
Session state recovery with sequence numbers and sync:request
UI shows 'X messages pending' when offline
UI shows banner when reconnecting after offline
